You run the business.
We bring the customers.

Copper Beacon helps local businesses get found and hired — on Google, in AI search like ChatGPT and Gemini, and everywhere customers look today.

Book a free 15-minute call See what we do

Founded by an engineer who grew a home services business to nearly $800k. No slick pitches. Just work that moves the numbers.

of Map Pack clicks go to the top 3 results

window to establish AI search visibility before competitors do

The technical marketing work, handled.

Most small businesses don't have time to learn local SEO, manage Google Business Profile, track AI search visibility, or chase reviews. We handle all of it — quietly, competently, and in plain English when you want updates.

Local search optimization

Your business, ranking where customers are looking — in the Google Map Pack, in organic search, and in "near me" results.

Google Business Profile management

The #1 source of local leads, properly optimized and actively managed — photos, posts, Q&A, service updates, everything.

Review generation & reputation

More reviews, faster. Automated request flows, response management, and a steady pipeline of 5-star social proof.

AI search visibility

When customers ask ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or Perplexity who's the best in your area — your business shows up in the answer.

See all services

Built for local businesses that want real results.

Copper Beacon works best for professional and service businesses with real revenue potential — dentists, orthodontists, chiropractors, lawyers, plumbers, HVAC companies, electricians, roofers, and similar local service providers. If your customers search for you online before picking up the phone, we can help.

DentistsOrthodontistsChiropractorsLawyersPlumbersHVACElectriciansRoofersPest ControlVeterinariansReal Estate AgentsInsurance Agents
See all industries we serve

You didn't start your business to become a marketing expert.

Quiet, technical, accountable

No slick sales pitch. No vague deliverables. You get clear monthly reports on what's been done and what it's producing — calls, customers, revenue.

Built on operator experience

The founder grew a home services business to nearly $800k in revenue. We know what small business owners actually need, because we've been one.

Ahead of where search is going

Customers now ask AI assistants for recommendations. Most agencies still haven't noticed. We optimize for Google and for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and whatever comes next.

A simple way to start working together.

  1. 1

    15-minute call

    Tell us about your business, your customers, and where you want to grow. No pitch deck. No pressure.

  2. 2

    Custom proposal

    We audit your current online visibility and build a plan specific to your business, industry, and goals.

  3. 3

    We get to work

    Clear scope. Clear pricing. Monthly check-ins. You focus on running the business while the customers start showing up.

Book your free call

Ready to let the customers find you?

Fifteen minutes. No pitch. Just a real conversation about whether we can help.
